title: fix review output
description: One independent adversarial reviewer's verdict on a proposed fix. Reviewers are told to try to REFUTE the fix: does it actually resolve the finding, is it correct, does it violate project standards, does it break anything adjacent. A blocker must carry concrete evidence.

verdict.description: pass = the fix correctly resolves the finding with zero blockers. reject = at least one blocker.

blockers.description: Concrete defects that make the fix unacceptable. Empty iff verdict=pass.

issue.description: What is wrong with the proposed fix, in one sentence.

evidence.description: file:line reference and the concrete reason — the failure scenario or standards clause violated.
